title: Worktree List TUI: Async Git Operations
description: Prototype command to test async git operations with spinners for the worktree list TUI

phase1_analysis.title: Analysis of Existing `gbm wt ls` TUI
phase1_analysis.overview: The current worktree list TUI (cmd/service/worktree_table.go) is a synchronous state machine with minimal async patterns. It uses Bubble Tea for rendering but executes git operations directly on the event loop, blocking the UI.

current_state_machine.description: Simple two-state FSM with confirmingDelete boolean flag

current_limitations: Pull/push/delete freeze the UI for seconds
No way to cancel long operations
No custom message types for operation results
No use of tea.Batch() or tea.Sequence()
patterns_to_preserve: Pre-initialization of branch statuses via goroutines
Keyboard shortcuts (↑/↓,j/k, l, p, d, q)
Visual indicators (* for current, ✓ ↑ ↓ for status)

phase2_design.title: testls Design - Async Git Operations
phase2_design.goal: Create gbm wt testls that replicates gbm wt ls functionality with non-blocking async git operations and spinner feedback

operationSuccessMsg.description: Sent when async git operation completes successfully

operationFailedMsg.description: Sent when async git operation fails

async_pattern.description: Use tea.Batch() to run spinner animation alongside async git operation
flow: spinner.TickMsg arrives → animate spinner, return spinner.Tick
operationSuccessMsg arrives → set IDLE, update row status

interface_design.name: testlsGitOps
interface_design.purpose: Minimal interface for git operations, enables dependency injection and testing with mocks

methods.name: RemoveWorktree
methods.signature: RemoveWorktree(worktreeName string, force, dryRun bool) (*git.Worktree, error)

interface_design.note: *git.Service already implements this interface - no adapter needed

display_components.name: ctx
display_components.purpose: Shared context with theme and dimensions

display_components.name: table
display_components.purpose: Table wrapper with async cell support

pkg_tui_integration.description: Use existing pkg/tui infrastructure for consistent styling

theme.usage: DefaultTheme() provides TableStyles with cyan header, white-on-magenta selected

async_cell.usage: NewCell(eval).StartLoading() returns tea.Cmd, Tick() animates spinner, View() renders

missing_method.purpose: Dynamic column resizing for responsive design

responsive_design.principle: Never hardcode dimensions - calculate from terminal size

implementation.window_size_handler: Handle tea.WindowSizeMsg to update ctx.WithDimensions() and recalculate table

functions.name: BuildWorktreeRow
functions.returns: Complete table row for a worktree

functions.name: CalculateTableHeight
functions.returns: Table height based on available space

implementation_steps.title: Extract shared helpers in worktree_table.go
tasks: Extract CalculateTableColumns(width int) for responsive columns
Refactor newWorktreeTable() to use these helpers

implementation_steps.title: Add SetColumns() to pkg/tui.Table
tasks: Add SetColumns(columns []Column) method to Table struct

implementation_steps.title: Create worktree_testls.go
tasks: Define operationState enum and message types

implementation_steps.title: Implement Init() method
tasks: Return nil (data pre-loaded, WindowSizeMsg sent automatically)

implementation_steps.title: Implement Update() with state machine
tasks: stateIdle: navigation, operation triggers, quit, select

implementation_steps.title: Implement async operations using pkg/tui/async
tasks: Create async.NewEval() with git operation + status fetch

implementation_steps.title: Implement View() method
tasks: Render result message when stateIdle with message

implementation_steps.title: Implement runTestlsTable() entry point
tasks: Create testlsModel with svc.Git as testlsGitOps
Handle output on exit (stdout path, stderr message)

create.purpose: testls model, Update(), View(), async commands
teatest integration tests with mock gitOps

modify.change: Extract and export shared helper functions
Add SetColumns() method for responsive resize

test_cases.name: TestTestlsInitialRender
test_cases.description: Table renders with correct columns and rows

test_cases.name: TestTestlsSelect
test_cases.description: Enter/Space selects and quits with output

test_cases.name: TestTestlsAsyncPull
test_cases.description: Pull shows spinner, completes, updates status

test_cases.name: TestTestlsAsyncPush
test_cases.description: Push shows spinner, completes, updates status

steps.test: Shared helpers don't break existing gbm wt ls
Manual testing of gbm wt testls

design_decisions.quit_behavior: Allow immediate quit during operations (async op continues but result is lost)
design_decisions.spinner_display: In the status column using pkg/tui/async.Cell[string]
design_decisions.styling: Use pkg/tui.Theme and pkg/tui.Table for consistent styling
design_decisions.context: Use pkg/tui.Context for shared state (dimensions, theme)
design_decisions.row_building: Extract shared helpers to worktree_table.go for reuse
